mapper.insert:
select rag_doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into rag_documents ( rag_doc_seq, source_type, source_seq, file_seq, file_name, file_ext, raw_text, extract_status, created_at )
values ( #{rag_doc_seq}, #{source_type}, #{source_seq} , #{file_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{file_name}, #{file_ext}, #{raw_text}, #{extract_status}, sysdate )

select chunk_seq.nextval from dual
insert into rag_chunks ( chunk_seq, rag_doc_seq, chunk_index, chunk_text, embed_status, created_at )
values ( #{chunk_seq}, #{rag_doc_seq},#{chunk_index}, #{chunk_text}, #{embed_status}, sysdate )
mapper.select: select chunk_seq, rag_doc_seq, chunk_text from rag_chunks order by chunk_seq
mapper.update: update rag_chunks set qdrant_point_id = #{qdrant_point_id}, embed_at = sysdate where chunk_seq = #{chunk_seq}
mapper.select: select rag_doc_seq from rag_documents where source_type = #{source_type} and source_seq = #{source_seq}
select qdrant_point_id from rag_chunks where rag_doc_seq = #{rag_doc_seq}
